category_sources: Official Tor Project GitLab description says torsocks routes applications safely through Tor and handles DNS safely.
source_facts.description says torsocks uses SOCKS-friendly applications with Tor.
display_name_sources: Official Tor Project GitLab project title is Torsocks.
docs_sources: Official GitLab repository README is the primary project documentation surface.
Tor Support glossary has an official torsocks entry.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Tor Project GitLab repository.
source_facts.source-archive is a Tor Project GitLab release archive.
tags_sources: Official GitLab description mentions safe Tor routing and DNS handling.
source_facts.description identifies Tor and SOCKS use.
